description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python Lib that runs on push to main, devel, deploy branches, on pull requests, and on release events. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It tests the Python library on Windows, Linux, and macOS with multiple Python versions, and builds the library on release events for Windows, macOS, and Linux with various Python versions and environments. Finally, it deploys the library to PyPI on release events if all tests and builds pass.
